name: io.github.srotzin/hive-mcp-spire
title: Hive SPIRE Attestation (AFiR)
description: Sign agent-instance mints, trajectories, and coherence with ML-DSA-65 (NIST FIPS 204). Each attestation is verifiable offline with the returned envelope. A record a party keeps about itself is a claim; SPIRE is the independent proof. Patent Pending.
